    Rated 5 Stars by Toronto Homeowners

    Real reviews from our satisfied customers

    5from 20+ Google reviews

    "Ali, is very professional, friendly and reliable. He and his brother are amazing and do not over charge or scam in any way. I recommend them for all your plumbing needs."

    E

    E Prab

    via Google · November 2025

    "Had a great experience with them. All came right on time on a saturday morning, and he quickly fixed 3-4 problems in my apartment unit such as fixing a sliding mirror door, re-installing a door and a few other minor problems. Will highly recommend them."

    S

    Sogl Nasab

    via Google · October 2025

    "I was so fortunate to come across and use Blue Men Plumbing. They were prompt, efficient and did great work. Their quote and final price was lower than I expected. Anyone needing a professional plumber for a small or an extensive large job; they are who to call and you won't be disappointed."

    M

    Michael Masse

    via Google · September 2025
